campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review transportation funding investments, adopt a new policy about how city property can be used, and discuss efforts to fill open city jobs and improve employee retention.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New city policy limiting use of city property for federal civil enforcement
City job openings and strategies to recruit and retain employees

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing to address concerns about cleaning up hazardous conditions on certain properties that the County identified. The Council approved an official order to move forward with the cleanup work on those properties and also adopted a new policy governing how the city handles technology-related disruptions.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property cleanup and resident objections
Council approval to order abatement work on County-identified properties
New Technology Disruption Policy adopted
Process established for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve financial records, accept a donation of emergency medical equipment, and authorize several service agreements and construction projects. The council also reviewed the town's finances for March 2026 and approved a list of projects for the upcoming fiscal year.
keyTopics: Approval of O'Grady Paving construction contract
Acceptance of Automated External Defibrillator (AED) donation
March 2026 financial and investment report review
Grant applications for statewide projects
Fiscal Year 2026-27 project list adoption

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 13, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a brief meeting focused on organizing upcoming business, including finalizing the agenda for their May 19th meeting and scheduling council members to various committees and boards. The council also reviewed the meeting schedule for the next fiscal year and approved a travel request.
keyTopics: Finalized the May 19, 2026 City Council agenda
Assigned council members to committees, boards, and commissions
Approved 2026-2027 meeting schedule for City Council
Approved travel request from Councilmember Foley

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 19, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council held a special session on May 19, 2026, to hear the State of the City Address. The meeting included a notice reminding residents that if they want to challenge any City decisions made at this meeting in court, they have 90 days from the final decision to file.
keyTopics: State of the City Address presentation
90-day deadline for legal challenges to City decisions
Special session meeting format

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council met on May 19, 2026, to conduct regular business and recognize two important observances: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The meeting began with a flag salute and featured these commemorations as special orders of the day.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
April meeting minutes approval

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety Element of its General Plan (covering 2015-2040), recognized the Public Works Department during Public Works Week for their work on roads, parks, utilities and sustainability, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Health and Safety Element updates to the city's long-term General Plan
Recognition of Public Works Department divisions including streets, sidewalks, trees, and environmental programs
Public Works Week celebration (May 17-23, 2026)
Asian American Pacific Islander Month recognition

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 19, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, in a hybrid format allowing both in-person and remote participation. Councilmember Albert Gonzalez participated remotely under a state law provision that allows remote attendance for specific reasons.
keyTopics: Hybrid meeting format with Zoom option for public participation
Councilmember Albert Gonzalez attending remotely under SB 707 'Just Cause' provision
Public comment submission available through eComment system

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they considered new city rules, approved a development project permit change, and hired a permanent City Manager. The council also conducted public hearings on assessment matters affecting residents.
keyTopics: New city ordinance passed as an emergency measure
Site development permit amendment approved for a construction project
Permanent City Manager appointment finalized
Public hearings held on property assessments

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council discussed plans to help residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles for electrification programs designed to help the city comply with air quality regulations.
keyTopics: Residential electrification status update and progress
Proposed principles for home electrification assistance programs
Air District regulation compliance requirements
Committee member announcements and public comments
